title: README.html - thunderbird-patch-review - Simple email patch review tool for Thunderbird
excerpt: Simple email patch review tool for Thunderbird
content_html:
Simple email patch review tool for Thunderbird

git clone git://mccd.space/thunderbird-patch-review

README.html (3011B)

Thunderbird Patch Review
Review git patches from email inside Thunderbird
Synopsis
A Thunderbird Add-on. Open a patch email, press Review, comment on hunks, send the review as a mailing-list reply, and apply the series to a local repository with git-am(1).
Screenshots
Installation (source)

Package the extension source code as an .xpi and install it via the Add-ons Manager gear menu (Install Add-on From File...). To package it, run the following from the project root:

(cd extension && zip -qrX ../patch-review.xpi .)

At some point I will upload the add-on to Thunderbird.

Sourcehut integration
When the series arrives via a sourcehut mailing list, an option to set the patch state header will appear when sending the review. It uses Sourcehut's email controls.
Caveats
Patches arriving as attachments, HTML-only mail, and reviewing from a git worktree preview are not supported yet. Series collection searches the folder of the opened message only.
See also
The introductory post contains a small snippet with motivation.
Disclaimer
This add-on was vibe coded using GLM5.2 and built to solve the needs of my team. I was hesitant to share it, as I generally do not like vibe-coded projects. However, given that a tool like this is sorely lacking from the ecosystem, I decided to share it anyway.
I have not reviewed the code line-by-line, but I designed the general approach the system should use, and focused on using as few dependencies as possible. I have also extensively Q&Ad the plugin manually alongside the test suite.
Contributing
Contributions and bug reports go to the mailing list: ~marcc/thunderbird-review-plugin@lists.sr.ht.
Author
Marc Coquand

Open a patch email, press Review, comment on hunks, send the review as a mailing-list reply, and apply the series to a local repository with git-am(1). Screenshots Fig: Patch button included in plugin Fig: Patch overview Fig: Apply patches from the UI. Fig: Catch errors and send feedback. Fig: Sourcehut integration. Installation (source) Package the extension source code as an .xpi and install it via the Add-ons Manager gear menu (Install Add-on From File...). To package it, run the following from the project root: (cd extension && zip -qrX ../patch-review.xpi .) At some point I will upload the add-on to Thunderbird. Sourcehut integration When the series arrives via a sourcehut mailing list, an option to set the patch state header will appear when sending the review. It uses Sourcehut's email controls. Caveats Patches arriving as attachments, HTML-only mail, and reviewing from a git worktree preview are not supported yet. Series collection searches the folder of the opened message only. See also The introductory post contains a small snippet with motivation. Disclaimer This add-on was vibe coded using GLM5.2 and built to solve the needs of my team. I was hesitant to share it, as I generally do not like vibe-coded projects. However, given that a tool like this is sorely lacking from the ecosystem, I decided to share it anyway. I have not reviewed the code line-by-line, but I designed the general approach the system should use, and focused on using as few dependencies as possible. I have also extensively Q&Ad the plugin manually alongside the test suite. Contributing Contributions and bug reports go to the mailing list: ~marcc/thunderbird-review-plugin@lists.sr.ht. Author Marc Coquand

content_html_zh:
Thunderbird 的简单电子邮件补丁审查工具

git clone git://mccd.space/thunderbird-patch-review

自述文件.html (3011B)

雷鸟补丁审查
在 Thunderbird 内查看电子邮件中的 git 补丁
概要
雷鸟插件。 打开补丁电子邮件，按“评论”，对帅哥进行评论，将评论作为邮件列表回复发送，然后使用 git-am(1) 将系列应用到本地存储库。
截图
图：插件中包含的补丁按钮 图：补丁概述 图：从 UI 应用补丁。 图：捕获错误并发送反馈。 图：Sourcehut 集成。
安装（来源）
将扩展源代码打包为 .xpi 并通过附加组件管理器齿轮菜单安装它（从文件安装附加组件...）。 要打包它，请从项目根目录运行以下命令：(cd extension && zip -qrX ../patch-review.xpi 。) 在某个时候，我会将附加组件上传到 Thunderbird。
Sourcehut集成
当该系列通过 sourcehut 邮件列表到达时，发送评论时将出现设置补丁状态标题的选项。 它使用 Sourcehut 的电子邮件控件。
注意事项
尚不支持以附件形式到达的补丁、纯 HTML 邮件以及从 git 工作树预览中进行审阅。 系列集合仅搜索已打开消息的文件夹。
参见
介绍性文章包含一个带有动机的小片段。
免责声明
这个附加组件是使用 GLM5.2 进行 vivi 编码的，旨在解决我团队的需求。 我很犹豫是否要分享它，因为我通常不喜欢振动编码的项目。 然而，鉴于生态系统中非常缺乏这样的工具，我还是决定分享它。
我没有逐行审查代码，但我设计了系统应该使用的通用方法，并专注于使用尽可能少的依赖项。 我还与测试套件一起手动对插件进行了广泛的问答。
贡献
贡献和错误报告请访问邮件列表：~marcc/thunderbird-review-plugin@lists.sr.ht。
作者
马克·科昆德
